notes: Braves opened SunTrust Park for the 2017 season
Left-field wall moved back/raised before 2022 season
Left-field wall moved in ahead of 2025 season
Blue Jays opened 2021 home schedule at TD Ballpark in Dunedin
Blue Jays moved home games to Sahlen Field on June 1, 2021 and returned to Rogers Centre July 30
Rays played the 2025 season at George M. Steinbrenner Field
Rays announced plans to return to Tropicana Field for 2026
Rangers regular-season home park switched to Globe Life Field in 2020 (2020 excluded in this model)
Athletics moved interim home games to Sutter Health Park for 2025-2027
Outfield walls moved in and lowered for 2026
